Windruned Dagger  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Careless Lightning (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 15
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Windruned Dagger
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Careless Lightning (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 15
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:20 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:246
Submitted By:Bently BixieSlayer
Lucy Entry By:Chromite
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-19 03:37:45
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 250,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 29
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name

Frontier Mountains

Nice item if....
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 9:51 AM Rating: Default
animekenji
1,123 posts
you can get it to proc consistently. Otherwise, the 2/20 ratio means you'll likely be dead before you even scratch the enemy and the sounds of his laughter at your puny weapon will haunt you for the remainder of your days.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?

Nice item if....
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2017 at 11:58 PM Rating: Decent
LydiusInsidious
Scholar
108 posts
Ugh... what?

I know my response is way over due but I've been playing since Velious and I can tell you this is a super solid weapon in a rogues hand. It also is a wonderful twink item too as the DD is wonderful.

Does this Still Drop?
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 6:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772085902
8 posts
Hello,
Has any one seen this item drop recently? I came across a humorous story that involved a ranger having a ridiculously fast but stupid weapon that was 1 dam and 1 delay. I know that no such beast existst, but this is pretty close to fitting the bill. Oh... usless tangent sorry. any way, if any one knows if this is still dropping the info would be greatly appreciated. Thank you.

QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2002 at 1:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777648217
100 posts
Wanna buy this on drinal server for my off hand gimmie an e-mail at shua824@aol.com if you got one for sale.

Edited, Sun Apr 7 16:31:33 2002
▲ Page top
Not that bad
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 8:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767643714
3 posts
Was working the cycle when this thing dropped. The Assassin was a panzy to my 45 RNG, but that's besides the point.

Because of the 20 delay and nice little proc, I'm keeping this in my bag. Low delay items like this are ideal against caster mobs so that you can interrupt more often. I pulled this baby out with my cracked branch (6/20) against the Sarnak Seer (which usually gives me problems) and I interrupted him so many times that he went down with only 1 snare and 1 dot.

With 1 weight, I'll keep this around as a neat little toy (until I get my lupine)
▲ Page top
Good thing....
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2001 at 2:29 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Good thing this is lore and I don't play a rogue. Two of these at high level in a room of frogloks in upper guk just for fun....... man am i glad it's lore, I'd HAVE to start a rogue if it wasn't.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 4:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who cares if you have a ragebringer, every rogue 51+ has one..the ones who dont look like newbs, the quest is too damn easy to brag about man
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 14 2001 at 11:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) THIS DOESNT HAVE ANYTHING TO DO WITH THE DAGGER!! NO ONE CARES HOW HIGH YOUR BACKSTABS ARE! IM A LEVEL 57 WITH A 564 HI BACKSTAB WITH SHAMMY STR BUFFS AND A RAGE BRINGER SO QUIT BRAGGIN!
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 13 2001 at 10:54 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Barbarian Rogue 181 Str lvl 52
#Anonymous, Posted: May 14 2001 at 4:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Looking for one of these on E'ci, send Ciroco a tell sometime.
#REDACTED, Posted: May 07 2001 at 8:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My level 30 rogue has a 13dmg weapon and has backstabbed for 230dmg. He rarely backstabs under 100dmg.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 28 2001 at 6:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if you have i would like to but give me a tell on the 7th hammer server (sneakizfeetz)
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 19 2001 at 9:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) sorry but i dont belive you backstab for 120 on average.=P, i have a lvl 29 friend with a very nice brightwood spear and full ravenscale, serated bone dirk in offhand, and i think his MAX backstab is like 114 or 115.

# May 01 2001 at 2:17 PM Rating: Default

he said he has this dagger as his secondary, and at level 27 with high enough strength and a nice spear he could easily BS for 120...

# Feb 19 2002 at 10:01 PM Rating: Decent
EnvyEyes
133 posts
I'd definitely agree... at lvl 32, my rogue was backstabbing for up to 198. 207+ when I hit lvl 33. Of course, I'm using a nice dagger from Luclin (Fungusbeast Spine) in primary. It's 13/28 so it may be a touch slower than others but the dmg is Nice! When they screwed up the path on Feb 14th, I was able to BS for 607, but that's beside the point... hehe

this weapon can be good as a seconday weapon for a rogue with a really nice piercer in as the main-hand. Careless lightning aint too bad of a spell especially that it attacks a lot of targets.

# Mar 07 2001 at 2:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
actually i have a rouge that uses this...think on this my rougue is level 27, he BS for about 120 on average, procs about 4 times (with this in secondary hand) during a tesch gnoll fight (average thing to go after at 27) the proc is a 99pt dd. thats almost 400pts..plus if i have a tank to evade too then i get in a couple of BS.. just because this weapon only has 2pts as main damage doesnt make it suck...as long as you have the dex to proc liek a thief

RE: My balls
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 1:25 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am currently a level 26 rogue. My max bs right now is 120 with a slime coated harpoon and my str at 133 and I am a Wood Elf. If this guy is a barb his str could be pushing 160 to 180 depending on his equip. At level 29 I hope to god that my bs is higher then 114 or 115 on avg. not to mention there is a hell of alot better things out there then raven scale. Plus a brightwood spear is only a 9 dam weapon you ever stop to think about what the dam on his weapon is? one more point of dam on you weapon increases you bs quite a bit. well at least that is my 2cp.
